Progress Bar: Now supports Free Dragging (Scrubbing) to allow users to jump to any point in the audio.

This area handles playback speed and secondary actions.

Playback Speed (Left): Replaced the dropdown/button with 5 parallel radio buttons. Speeds: 0.5x, 0.75x, 1.0x (Default), 1.5x, 2.0x. Style: Active selection is highlighted/colored; others are desaturated/grey.

Download Button: Relocated to the far right of the player for clear separation from playback controls.
